name: zero-local-agent-quality
description: Clean-room local fixture suite for exercising Zero coding-agent task success without live provider calls.

tasks.name: Document stream JSON verify events
tasks.description: Docs-only task covering the verify and self-verify event contract.
tasks.prompt: Update the stream-json protocol docs so maintainers can see how `zero verify --json` and `zero selfverify --json` report start, check, summary, and error events. Keep the wording accurate, local-first, and do not change runtime code.

tasks.name: Separate Go release checks from Node wrapper checks
tasks.description: Docs task that keeps the npm wrapper guidance honest and dependency-free.
tasks.prompt: Improve the npm wrapper smoke checklist so a maintainer can distinguish Go release checks from direct `bin/zero.js` wrapper checks. Keep Node usage limited to the wrapper itself and do not add Bun, TypeScript, or package build dependencies.

tasks.name: Add provider catalog stability coverage
tasks.description: Focused test task for model registry aliases and provider names.
tasks.prompt: Add focused tests for provider catalog defaults so common model aliases and provider display names remain stable. Keep the change inside the model registry package.

tasks.name: Tighten config validation errors
tasks.description: Small Go task for deterministic config validation behavior.
tasks.prompt: Make config validation return actionable errors when the default provider is missing from the provider map, and cover the behavior with a table test. Do not change config file locations or environment variable names.

tasks.name: Preserve MCP server order
tasks.description: Regression task for deterministic MCP configuration output.
tasks.prompt: Add coverage showing MCP server names are emitted in deterministic sorted order when rendering config summaries. Keep the production change, if any, inside the MCP config package.

tasks.name: Clarify agent permission denial copy
tasks.description: Prompt and test task for local permission-denial messaging.
tasks.prompt: Clarify the local agent system prompt so denied file operations explain the blocked path and the next safe action. Add a focused test that checks the denial guidance without depending on a live model.

tasks.name: Add release smoke dry-run note
tasks.description: Release-facing task that ties docs to local smoke behavior.
tasks.prompt: Update the release smoke guidance and tests so maintainers can tell when a smoke run is using an already-built local binary. Keep the checks local and deterministic.
